title: Aliasing, Effective Type, Provenance, and Type Punning · Memory Trace: Memcpy Type Punning
summary: A high-performance decoder casts byte storage into structures and changes output only under optimization. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem memcpy type punning increment in defined binary decoder with provenance notes. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use memcpy into a live destination object for representation transfer and validate the resulting value domain.
Preserve optimizer-visible non-aliasing rules and test any deliberate compiler-extension policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
